Main.description: OpenShips is a free and open-source Vessel Tracking Platform as an alternative to platforms like MarineTraffic or VesselFinder. It provides real-time tracking of ships, allowing users to monitor vessel movements and access detailed information about each ship.
Main.opengraph_description: OpenShips is a free and open-source Vessel Tracking Platform as an alternative to platforms like MarineTraffic or VesselFinder. It provides real-time tracking of ships, allowing users to monitor vessel movements and access detailed information about each ship.

Popup_FirstVisit.title: Welcome to OpenShips!
Popup_FirstVisit.message: Thanks for visiting! Please note that the data displayed on this platform is sourced from AIS (Automatic Identification System) and may not be 100% accurate or up-to-date. Always verify information with official sources when necessary.
